chunks.title: Wisdom and Patience in Life's Trials
chunks.reason: A cohesive collection of proverbs contrasting the wise and foolish, emphasizing patience and the value of a good name.

chunks.title: The Balance of Righteousness and Human Frailty
chunks.reason: An argument advising moderation in righteousness and wisdom while acknowledging universal human sinfulness.

chunks.title: The Search for Meaning and the Preacher's Conclusion
chunks.reason: A personal reflection on the limits of wisdom, the difficulty of finding a righteous man, and the final conclusion that God made men upright.
